PredictiveSearchProduct.description:
Search API Types
Based on Shopify Storefront API documentation
https://shopify.dev/docs/api/storefront/latest/queries/predictiveSearch
https://shopify.dev/docs/api/storefront/latest/queries/products

EnrichedProduct.description: Product with enriched rating data (matches homescreen format)

CollectionWithProducts.description: Collection with products (matches homescreen categoryCollectionGrid format)

InitialSearchScreenResponse.description:
Response for GET /customer/search/initial-screen
Returns trending products and collections for the search screen

EnrichedSearchItem.description: Enriched search item - can be either a product or collection with complete Shopify data

EnrichedTrendingSearch.description: Enriched trending search - similar to EnrichedSearchItem but with trending metrics

SearchContextResponse.description:
Response for GET /customer/search/context
Returns personalized search context including recent searches, trending searches, and trending products

PromoTag.description: PromoTag for promotional badges on carousel items

CategoryGridItem.description: Category grid item for icon-based navigation

CollectionDisplay.description: Collection display with dynamic UI layouts

CategoryCollectionItem.description: Collection item within category collection grid

CollectionShowcaseItem.description: Collection showcase with different UI types

FavoritesResponse.description: Favorites response - returns just product IDs for efficient client-side merging

CartItemInput.description: Cart item input for adding to cart

AddItemsRequest.description: Add items to cart request body

info.title: Cartaisy API
info.description: E-commerce backend API with Shopify integration

get.description:
Predictive Search - Autocomplete/Suggestions
Fast search for autocomplete dropdown (< 100ms typical response time)

parameters.description: - Number of results per type (default: 10, max: 10 per Shopify)
parameters.name: limit

get.description:
Full Product Search - Search Results Page
Comprehensive search with pagination, filtering, and sorting

Shopify search query syntax:
- "laptop" - Simple keyword
- "title:laptop" - Search in title only
- "tag:electronics" - Filter by tag
- "vendor:Apple" - Filter by vendor
- "product_type:Computers" - Filter by product type
- "available:true" - Only available products

post.description:
Track Product Click
Track when user clicks on a search result

get.description:
Get Popular Searches
Returns most frequently searched terms

Get User's Recent Searches
Returns authenticated user's recent search history

post.description:
Clear User's Search History
Deletes authenticated user's search history

get.description:
Get Initial Search Screen Data
Returns trending products and collections for the search screen with complete data including images, ratings, and enriched product information.
Products and collections match the homescreen data format for UI component reuse.

parameters.description: - Timeframe in days for trending calculation (default: 7)
parameters.name: timeframe

get.description:
Get Search Context Data
Returns personalized search context with enriched product/collection data for recent and trending searches.
Authentication is optional - recent searches only included for authenticated users.

parameters.description: - Number of items to return per category (default: 5, max 5)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: - Timeframe in days for trending calculation (default: 7)
parameters.name: timeframe

get.description:
Main Product Search
Comprehensive search with filters, pagination, and sorting

parameters.description: - Sort order (relevance, price_low, price_high, rating, popular, newest)
parameters.name: sortBy

get.description:
Get Search Suggestions
Fast autocomplete suggestions from search history and products

Get Popular Searches
Returns most frequently searched terms

Get Trending Searches
Returns searches with highest growth rate

Get Failed Searches
Returns searches that returned no results (admin analytics)

post.description:
Track Search Click
Track when user clicks on a search result

get.description:
Get User Search History
Returns authenticated user's recent search history

post.description:
Clear User Search History
Deletes authenticated user's search history

get.description:
Get Search Analytics
Comprehensive search analytics including volume, trends, device stats

Get Trending Collections
Returns most viewed collections in given timeframe

post.description:
Track Collection View
Track when user views a collection page

Log Search
Explicitly log a search from the mobile app to populate recent searches.
Call this when user performs a search and views results.

get.description: Get detailed product information by ID

parameters.description: - Shopify product ID (numeric or GID format)
parameters.name: productId

get.description:
Get complete homescreen data
Returns all components needed to render the mobile app home screen

Get user's favorite product IDs
Returns a simple array of product IDs for efficient client-side merging
Get products from a collection with pagination, filtering, and sorting

parameters.description: - Shopify collection ID (numeric or GID format)
parameters.name: collectionId

parameters.description: - Pagination cursor for fetching next page
parameters.name: cursor

parameters.description: - Reverse the sort order (for high to low)
parameters.name: reverse

parameters.description: - JSON string of ProductFilter array for filtering products
parameters.name: filters

requestBody.description: - Optional initial items to add to cart

schema.description: - Optional initial items to add to cart

get.description: Get cart by ID

post.description:
Associate cart with logged-in customer
Call this when user logs in to merge guest cart with their account
